sentences.arabic: لَقَدْ صاغَ تاريخُ تِجارَةِ التَّوابِلِ القَديمُ المَلامِحَ النَّكْهِيَّةَ المُمَيَّزَةَ لِلْمَطْبَخِ الشَّرْقِ أَوْسَطِيِّ عَبْرَ العُصورِ.
sentences.translation: Drevna istorija trgovine začinima oblikovala je karakteristične profile ukusa bliskoistočne kuhinje kroz vijekove.
sentences.translationEn: The ancient history of the spice trade has shaped the distinctive flavor profiles of Middle Eastern cuisine throughout the ages.

sentences.arabic: تُسْتَخْدَمُ مَزيجُ البَهاراتِ، مِثْلَ السُّماقِ وَالزَّعْتَرِ وَالكَمُّونِ، بِدِقَّةٍ مُتَناهِيَةٍ لِإِضْفاءِ عُمْقٍ لِلْمَذاقِ.
sentences.translation: Mješavine začina, poput sumaka, majčine dušice (za'atara) i kima, koriste se s krajnjom preciznošću kako bi se ukusu dodala dubina.
sentences.translationEn: Spice blends, such as sumac, za'atar, and cumin, are used with extreme precision to add depth to the flavor.

sentences.arabic: وَيُعْتَقَدُ أَنَّ الاِخْتِيارَ الدَّقيقَ لِهَذِهِ المُكَوِّناتِ يُمْكِنُ أَنْ يُحَوِّلَ حَساءَ العَدَسِ البَسيطَ إِلَى تُحْفَةٍ طَهْوِيَّةٍ فاخِرَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Vjeruje se da pažljiv odabir ovih sastojaka može pretvoriti običnu čorbu od leće u luksuzno kulinarsko remek-djelo.
sentences.translationEn: It is believed that the careful selection of these ingredients can transform a simple lentil soup into a luxurious culinary masterpiece.

sentences.arabic: عِلاوَةً عَلَى ذَلِكَ، تُوَظَّفُ هَذِهِ الأَعْشابُ لَيْسَ فَقَطْ لِتَحْسينِ الطَّعْمِ، بَلْ لِفَوائِدِها المَعْرُوفَةِ فِي تَعْزيزِ عَمَلِيَّةِ الهَضْمِ.
sentences.translation: Osim toga, ove biljke se koriste ne samo za poboljšanje ukusa, već i zbog njihovih poznatih prednosti u podsticanju procesa probave.
sentences.translationEn: Furthermore, these herbs are employed not only to enhance taste but for their known benefits in promoting the digestion process.

sentences.arabic: لِذَلِكَ، يَظَلُّ إِتْقانُ خَلْطِ التَّوابِلِ سِرًّا مَوْروثًا تَتَناقَلُهُ الأَجْيالُ لِلْحِفاظِ عَلَى الهُوِيَّةِ الغِذائِيَّةِ لِلْمِنْطَقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Stoga, majstorstvo miješanja začina ostaje naslijeđena tajna koju generacije prenose kako bi očuvale prehrambeni identitet regije.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, mastering the blending of spices remains an inherited secret passed down through generations to preserve the region's culinary identity.
